highlights.text: Architected and delivered 5+ enterprise web applications using Angular, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, Docker, and Redis, maintaining 99.9% production uptime.
Improved backend efficiency through Redis caching, SQL query optimization, indexing strategies, and architectural refinements.
Reduced Angular UI load times via lazy loading, OnPush change detection, RxJS streams, and component-level profiling.
Designed secure RESTful APIs with JWT authentication and RBAC middleware, hardening security across multiple production applications.
Implemented real-time collaboration features using SignalR, enabling live multi-user editing and synchronized workflows in publishing platforms.
Containerized applications using Docker and Docker Compose, standardizing deployments and eliminating environment inconsistencies.
Integrated AWS S3 with presigned URL workflows for secure, expiry-gated document storage across editorial and vendor platforms.
Built AI-powered chat assistant using SSE streaming and LLM API integration (Ollama), enabling real-time conversational UX in enterprise apps.
Established CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions, automating build, test, and Docker image deployment workflows.
Conducted code reviews, built reusable component libraries, and mentored junior developers — reducing post-release defects and improving team delivery quality.
